bibliographic_info.title: Enhancing BDS-3 PPP-B2b real-time positioning performance by tightly integrating MEMS IMU and LiDAR in GNSS-Degraded environment

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Measurement 242 (2025) 116015 ContentslistsavailableatScienceDirect Measurement journalhomepage:www.elsevier.com/locate/measurement Enhancing BDS-3 PPP-B2b real-time positioning performance by tightly integrating MEMS IMU and LiDAR in GNSS-Degraded environment Wenzhuo Guoa,b, Linyang Lia,c,d,*, Dongqing Zhaoa, Fengbo Zhua, Luguang Laia aInstituteofSurveyingandMapping,InformationE
However, in a complex Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS)-degraded environment, the BDS-3 MEMSIMUandLiDARtightintegration PPP-B2b positioning performance is severely influenced.
